intro: With over 7 years of experience in the Information Technology industry, coupled with a passionate dedication and proficient skills in utilizing various programming platforms such as PHP, Laravel, Node js, Reactjs, Vuejs, and expertise in server management, I aspire to have the opportunity to apply my skills. I am continuously learning and adapting to advancements in the field.I am eager to contribute my knowledge and experience to the growth of a business, while also further enhancing my expertise to take on more challenging roles. This serves as a platform for me to reach higher positions in the next 5 years.

strengthsWeaknesses.title: Core Strengths
strengthsWeaknesses.systemThinking: Strong system thinking and architecture mindset

project.detail_1:
This is a real estate platform that allows users to search for projects, post listings to sell or rent land, and easily manage their personal listings.

Website

https://novaxbds.nrglobal.top/

Main Features

  • Search and browse real estate projects
  • User registration and authentication
  • Post listings to sell or rent land
  • Manage and edit personal listings

Technologies Used

HTML5CSS3JavascriptjQueryPHPWordPressResponsive Design

Role

Fullstack Developer – responsible for developing the entire system from frontend to backend. Built a custom WordPress theme from scratch based on the UI design, implemented the frontend interface using HTML, CSS and Javascript, developed backend functionalities using PHP and WordPress, and optimized the website to ensure responsive layouts across multiple devices.

Team Size

1 Developer, 1 Designer
project.detail_2:
This is a website about architecture and construction, providing information about design and construction services, while allowing users to search for information, schedule consultations, and access feng shui tools related to construction.

Website

https://demo.618.vn/

Main Features

  • Search for services and content on the website
  • Online consultation booking
  • Feng shui lookup and Lu Ban ruler tools
  • Recruitment form for applicants
  • Synchronize form data to Google Sheets
  • Crawl data from external sources
  • Integrate lazy loading for images to improve page loading speed
  • SEO optimization for the website
  • Performance optimization and Google PageSpeed improvement

Technologies Used

HTML5CSS3JavascriptjQueryPHPWordPressResponsive Design

Role

Fullstack Developer – developed a custom WordPress theme from scratch based on the UI design, built the frontend interface using HTML, CSS and Javascript, implemented backend functionalities with PHP and WordPress, integrated form data with Google Sheets, implemented lazy loading for images to improve performance, and optimized the website for SEO and overall performance.

Team Size

1 Developer, 1 Designer
project.detail_3:
This is a movie browsing website that allows users to explore popular movies and movies currently playing in theaters. The application fetches movie data from an external API and displays it with a modern user interface, while improving user experience with skeleton loading during data fetching.

Website

https://project-react-lime.vercel.app/

GitHub

https://github.com/CristianToan/PracticeTest

Main Features

  • Fetch API to display a list of popular movies
  • Fetch API to display a list of movies currently playing in theaters
  • Use Zustand for state management and API store handling
  • Display skeleton loading while data is being fetched
  • Responsive interface compatible with multiple devices

Technologies Used

ReactZustandTailwind CSSREST APIResponsive Design

Role

Frontend Developer – built the user interface from scratch using React and Tailwind CSS, integrated APIs to display movie data, organized state management using Zustand, and improved user experience with skeleton loading.

Team Size

1 Developer
project.detail_4:
This is an electronics e-commerce website that allows users to search for products, view promotional information, shop and place orders online. The system includes a backend API, an admin management panel, and an end-user interface for managing products, staff, and orders.

GitHub

https://github.com/CristianToan/Ecommerce-shop

Main Features

  • Search and view information about electronics products
  • Filter products by category and brand
  • Place orders and manage order information
  • User authentication and role-based authorization
  • Manage products, staff, and orders through the admin panel
  • Send notification emails using Nodemailer

Technologies Used

ReactNext.jsNode.jsExpress.jsTypeScriptMongoDBZustandJWT AuthenticationTailwind CSSAnt Design

Role

Fullstack Developer – built the entire backend system using Node.js and Express.js with MongoDB, designed RESTful APIs following the MVC architecture to manage products, staff, and orders. Implemented user authentication using JWT with access tokens and refresh tokens, applied middleware and Joi/Yup for request validation. Developed the admin dashboard using React, Tailwind CSS, and Ant Design to perform CRUD operations and manage system data. Also built the end-user interface using Next.js, integrated APIs to display products, filter by categories and brands, manage authentication with middleware, and implement the product ordering process.

Team Size

1 Developer
project.detail_5:
This is a backend API system used to manage student information. The system provides APIs to create, update, delete, and retrieve a list of students, while storing and managing data in a MongoDB database.

GitHub

https://github.com/CristianToan/PracticeTest

Main Features

  • Build APIs for managing student information
  • Create, update, and delete student data
  • Retrieve the list of students from the database
  • Store and manage data using MongoDB

Technologies Used

Node.jsExpress.jsMongoDBREST API

Role

Backend Developer – designed and implemented the MongoDB database, developed APIs using Node.js and Express.js to perform create, update, delete, and retrieve operations for student data, and structured the API system to efficiently manage and handle data.

Team Size

1 Developer

HTML5CSS3JavaScriptjQueryPHPWordPressPolylang

project.detail_10:
This is a personal portfolio website built to showcase professional experience, technical skills, and completed projects. The application is developed using a component-based React architecture with performance optimizations to provide a smooth browsing experience when exploring projects.

Main Features

  • Display personal information, experience, and technical skills
  • Showcase completed projects
  • Multi-language support implemented using custom React Hooks
  • Project filtering and grouping optimized with useMemo
  • Animated number counters (Count Up effect)
  • Responsive interface compatible with multiple devices

Technologies Used

ReactReact HooksTailwind CSSResponsive Design

Role

Frontend Developer – designed the component architecture using React; built the UI with Tailwind CSS; implemented custom hooks for multi-language functionality; optimized performance using useMemo and lazy loading components; and added UI animations such as Count Up to enhance user experience.

Team Size

1 Developer

Implemented backend features with PHP and WordPress, built product management and ordering functionality, integrated multilingual support with Polylang, developed Ajax-based company charter viewing, and handled email notifications for consultation form submissions.
